title: Senior Investment Banker at Axis Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at Axis Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Axis Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Axis Bank:
Axis Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axis Bank!
